w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: to ensure that all emergency stop buttons within the building are inspected
Button is installed within easy reach for an operative to activate if working on the corresponding equipment.
There is adequate clearance around the Button, and it is not impeded.
Button shows molded arrows that are used to
Button is installed with/on a ‘Yellow’ background.
Button and enclosure have been checked for visible damage
Activation of the Button has been tested
Upon activation ‘Alarms’ for the correct equipment are sent to the Building Management System.
Equipment can’t be restarted manually after Button has been activated.
Button upon ‘Reset’ does not restart the Equipment it serves.
manually after Button has been reset.
